channel.title: Ryan A. Koval - Blog RSS Feed
channel.description: Writing and notes from Ryan A. Koval on software engineering, JavaScript, Scala, and infrastructure.

item.title: Recovering Tectonic Using an Externally Provisioned etcd on AWS
item.description: Braindump of the recovery process I had to do to recover our Tectonic Kubernetes cluster from a manual configuration change that broke the control plane.

item.title: Avoiding Option Altogether
item.description: Avoiding null-able values when you can guarantee that a value will never be null/None.

item.title: Debugging JavaScript in Chrome and Firefox
item.description: Simple tools you can use to make your life as a JavaScript developer much easier — with live, interactive demos.
